title: AI-Enabled Full Stack Python Developer
description: AI-Enabled Full Stack Python Developer About the Role We are looking for a hands-on AI-enabled Full Stack Python Developer to design and build data-driven applications enhanced with modern AI/LLM capabilities. This role combines strong software engineering fundamentals with rapid prototyping, AI integration, and business problem solving. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to develop scalable solutions, build internal tools, and deliver high-impact applications leveraging the latest AI technologies. Key Responsibilities Develop and maintain full stack applications with a strong focus on Python backend and lightweight frontends Build AI-powered solutions using LLMs (e.g., OpenAI / Azure OpenAI) and prompt engineering techniques Design and develop user interfaces using tools like Streamlit or similar frameworks Integrate with APIs, databases, and external systems Translate business requirements into practical, scalable technical solutions Ensure code quality through testing, debugging, and best engineering practices Collaborate with stakeholders to iterate quickly and deliver value in an agile environment Leverage AI-assisted development tools to enhance productivity and code quality Required Qualifications Minimum 3 years of professional experience in software development Strong proficiency in Python Experience in full stack development (backend + frontend fundamentals) Experience with data processing libraries (e.g., Pandas, NumPy) Hands-on experience with REST APIs and JSON-based integrations Familiarity with LLM concepts and prompt engineering Experience with OpenAI / Azure OpenAI or similar AI platforms Basic knowledge of SQL and/or NoSQL databases Experience with Git and modern development workflows Strong problem-solving and debugging skills Preferred Qualifications Experience with Streamlit or similar rapid UI frameworks Familiarity with LangChain or similar LLM orchestration tools Understanding of testing frameworks (pytest, unittest) Exposure to CI/CD pipelines Basic knowledge of financial, tax, or accounting domains Experience with AI-assisted coding tools , such as: GitHub Copilot Factory.ai CodeX ClaudeCode What We’re Looking For A builder mindset who enjoys rapid prototyping and iteration Ability to work with ambiguity and evolving requirements Strong communication and collaboration skills Curiosity for emerging AI technologies and continuous learning Ownership and accountability in delivering high-quality solutions

title: SENIOR FULL STACK DEVELOPER
description: SENIOR FULL STACK DEVELOPER İş Tanımı Şirketimiz bünyesinde geliştirilen araç takip, IoT ve veri odaklı yazılım projelerinde görev alacak; projelerin frontend ve backend bileşenlerinin geliştirilmesinde aktif rol alacak Senior Full Stack Developer arıyoruz. Bu pozisyon; mevcut uygulamaların sürdürülebilirliğini sağlamak, yeni özellikler geliştirmek, performans ve güvenlik iyileştirmeleri yapmak ve projelerin uçtan uca yazılım geliştirme süreçlerine katkıda bulunmak üzere kurgulanmıştır. Adaydan; takım çalışmasına yatkın, analitik düşünebilen, gerçek zamanlı veri işleyen sistemler, IoT entegrasyonları ve yapay zeka destekli uygulamalar üzerinde aktif rol alması beklenmektedir. Senden Neler Bekliyoruz? Senior Full Stack Developer olarak en az 5 yıl profesyonel deneyim Frontend tarafında: HTML, CSS React (tercihen Next.js) ile uygulama geliştirme deneyimi Backend tarafında: C# / .NET Core ile API ve servis geliştirme tecrübesi RESTful API tasarımı ve entegrasyonu konusunda deneyim Veritabanları: MsSQL veya PostgreSQL (tercihen her ikisi) NoSQL sistemler (MongoDB vb.) hakkında temel bilgi Git ve benzeri versiyon kontrol sistemleriyle çalışma deneyimi Gerçek zamanlı veri akışı ve stream tabanlı sistemlerle (WebSocket, MQTT, benzeri) çalışma deneyimi Araç takip sistemleri, IoT projeleri veya telemetri tabanlı uygulamalar üzerinde geliştirme veya entegrasyon tecrübesi Verilerin dashboard, grafik veya rapor formatlarında görselleştirilmesi konusunda deneyim Temel sunucu, ağ ve bulut altyapısı bilgisi (tercihen AWS) Analitik düşünme yeteneği, problem çözme becerisi ve ekip çalışmasına yatkınlık Tercih Sebebi Olabilecek Ek Yetenekler: Docker, Kubernetes gibi konteyner teknolojileriyle çalışma deneyimi CI/CD süreçleri ve DevOps araçları hakkında bilgi Yapay zeka tabanlı uygulamaların backend entegrasyonlarında görev almış olmak Mobil uygulama geliştirme veya entegrasyon deneyimi UX/UI prensiplerine aşinalık Agile/Scrum araçları (Trello vb.) ile çalışma deneyimi

title: Software Engineer, Backend
description: About Codeway Codeway is a global consumer tech company with more than 400M users worldwide. Since 2020, we’ve built and scaled 60+ mobile apps across creativity, productivity, wellness, language learning, and entertainment. Our flagship apps — Retake AI, Cleanup, Learna, and DramaPops — and many of them lead their categories globally. In 2024, we became the most downloaded app publisher on iOS, driven by cutting-edge AI research, sharp data-driven execution, and a relentless focus on product and marketing. We’re a team of 300+ people across İstanbul and Barcelona who bring curiosity, passion, trust, and ownership to everything we build. Recognized as a #1 LinkedIn Top Startup and a Great Place to Work in Europe, Codeway is where ambitious people do their life’s best work. We’re building the next generation of consumer tech and reimagining what mobile apps can be. This is Codeway. This is our way. Join us. POSITION As a Software Engineer, Backend at Codeway, you will design and implement the scalable systems that power products used by millions. You won’t just write code; you will own features end-to-end—from initial system design and AI integration to deployment and production monitoring. Our environment is fast-paced, and we value engineers who can turn complex architectural challenges into simple, elegant, and maintainable solutions. What You’ll Do Design and implement scalable systems. Build high-performance backend architectures for mobile and web clients using Node.js and Python. Own features end-to-end. Take full responsibility for the lifecycle of your services—ideation, implementation, deployment (GCP/Firebase), and continuous optimization. Integrate AI and media workflows. Integrate LLMs and media workflows (STT/TTS, image/video/audio processing), managing model serving, inference performance, and latency/cost tradeoffs. Architect asynchronous workflows. Implement robust event-driven systems using queues and tasks to handle heavy media and AI workloads. Simplify systems. Evaluate every component and process to remove unnecessary complexity and build minimalist, future-proof architectures. Optimize performance. Proactively identify bottlenecks to improve latency, throughput, and costs. Ensure backend quality. Establish robust error handling, security best practices, and end-to-end observability to ensure production reliability. Collaborate cross-functionally. Partner with Mobile, Product, DevOps, and AI teams to design and ship impactful features. What You’ll Bring Experience: 2+ years of professional experience as a Backend Engineer, with a track record of building consumer-facing products at scale. Technical Excellence: Strong proficiency in Node.js and Python with a deep understanding of CS fundamentals, data structures, and algorithms. Infrastructure Knowledge: Hands-on experience with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and/or Firebase, with strong production debugging and observability habits. System Design: A solid grasp of databases, API design, and security best practices. AI Familiarity: Experience deploying and optimizing AI models in production, including familiarity with external AI APIs and their performance considerations. Communication: Proficiency in English with the ability to explain complex engineering decisions and trade-offs clearly to both technical and non-technical teams. Education: A BS or MS in Computer Science or a related technical field. NICE TO HAVE Experience with GCP tools such as Pub/Sub, Cloud Run, GKE, BigQuery, or Cloud Functions Familiarity with SSE or WebSockets for real-time communication Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines Experience with message brokers like Kafka, RabbitMQ, or SQS What We Offer Great Place to Work. As our top team member, you'll be a part of a fast-growing startup and have the privilege to enjoy our accredited “BEST WORKPLACES” environment, ranked first among all workplaces. A Competitive Compensation Package. Long story short, we take care of you. A Meal Compensation. That is actually enough for a decent & nutritious lunch, we’re not following the industry standard. Full Health Benefits. To keep you away from all the trouble, we provide unlimited private health insurance and cover the HPV vaccine. Pet Adoption Support. We cover the primary healthcare expenses, parasite vaccinations, and microchip costs that may arise within the first year after employees adopt a pet. Cool Tech Stack. Macbook, iPhone 15 Pro, magic mouse, magic keyboard; an adjustable desk with a 4K screen and any other gadget you may need in your job. Sport Activities Support. We care about your physical wellbeing and support your gym membership. Learning Never Ends! Training budget to help you grow in your role, gain new skills, and learn new things. Udemy Free Pass. An unlimited Udemy subscription. Flexible Schedule & Unlimited Vacations. This isn’t a “clock in, clock out” company. We care about your productivity, not tracking every minute you’re on site. It’s up to you to always be responsible with your work, no matter where you are or what schedule you’re keeping. English Course Support. Be more global and perform best at your work. Comprehensive Well-being Support. Through our partnership with Meditopia, we now offer free psychological counseling, along with additional services like dietitian, personal trainer, parenting consultant, physiotherapist, child & adolescent therapist, and face-to-face counseling for employees in Istanbul. A Top-Notch Office. Located at the heart of Istanbul, right next to Levent Metro Station at Ferko Signature. Codebrew. Yes, you’ve heard it right: We love coffee so much that we’ve built our own coffee shop inside our office, where we also provide healthy snacks at certain hours. Free Breakfast. At Codebrew - every morning at 9:30 AM. No Dress Code. Dress as you like. Happy Hours Every Friday. Every. Single. Friday. When it’s 5 PM: Screens off, party on! (Check out Codeway on Instagram) Dream Team. Average Codeway member is young, talented, and passionate - which makes our working environment extremely dynamic. Need proof? Take a look at our Instagram. Gaming Area. Whenever you need to take a break from hard work and relax with your favorite games, our PS5 corner will be waiting for you. Software Support. Subscription to any software you might need to perform at your best. Public Transportation Support. Daily public transportation support is on us, covered by an additional monthly compensation. Parent Support. Becoming a parent is a big moment, and Codeway celebrates it with you. We offer a one-time grant to support our new parents. Massage Room. When you need a moment to recharge and unwind, our massage chair room will be ready to offer you a relaxing break. THE RECRUITING PROCESS We are committed to keeping our recruitment process short and transparent. Here’s how it looks like: Application: Send us your CV or LinkedIn profile. You can also just write a few words about yourself. Case Study: We might send you a task to solve. Talent & Culture Interview: Let’s talk about your experience & expectations and see what we can achieve together. Technical Interview: You will meet with future team lead to go over the case and your technical capabilities in detail. Reference Check: We will contact your references to gain insights into your past experiences and work ethic. Welcome Aboard! You are now a part of the team. Your personal data that will be collected through your applications made due to this advertisement will be processed automatically by the data controller Codeway in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 ("KVKK") and relevant legislation for the purpose of conducting job application processes. You can access detailed information on this matter from the "Candidate Information Notice" page at https://www.codeway.co . Codeway processes the personal data of job applicants in accordance with relevant legislation. " Privacy Notice for Employee Candidate " summarizes the data processing procedures during the application process. Bu ilan sebebiyle yapacağınız başvurular aracılığıyla toplanacak kişisel verileriniz veri sorumlusu Codeway tarafından 6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu (“KVKK”) ve ilgili mevzuat kapsamında iş başvuru süreçlerinin yürütülmesi amacıyla otomatik yollarla işlenecektir. Detaylı bilgiye https://www.codeway.co adresindeki "Aday Aydınlatma Metnimizin" sayfasından ulaşabilirsiniz. Codeway, iş başvurusu yapan adayların kişisel verilerini, ilgili mevzuat çerçevesinde işlemektedir. "Çalışan Adayı İçin Gizlilik Bildirimi" başvuru sürecindeki veri işleme süreçlerini özetler. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.
